message:
fix: restore LIFO recycling exhibit — it works (was CDN cache delay)

The exhibit was working correctly all along — the earlier failures
were from viewing a stale cached version before GitHub Pages
deployed the fix that keeps reused scopes open.

Reverted the removal, fixed benchmark text to not hardcode exhibit
count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2157,7 +2157,7 @@

Rapid Scope Churn — How Fast Is the Runtime?

This benchmark measures real WASM operations per second — scope create + close cycles including handle allocation, generation tracking, parent registration, and full cleanup. The result: structured concurrency at microsecond latency. - These are the same operations that make all 20 exhibits above possible, running at production speed. + These are the same operations that power every exhibit on this page, running at production speed.
